---
title: "Geometric Deep Learning Grids, Groups, Graphs, Geodesics, and Gauges"
date: 2026-05-29
author: "Michael M. Bronstein, Joan Bruna, Taco Cohen, Petar Veličković"
categories: [GDL]
---

```{=html}
<iframe src="paper_2.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border:none;"></iframe>
```

---

- [RENDER PDF FULLSCREEN](paper_2.pdf)

---
